zh.lifeSummary: 當William Thompson I於1320年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親John Thompson20歲，母親Alice de Mortimer20歲。他於大約1340年與Anne Pennington在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世在蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Thompson I于1320年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲John Thompson20岁，母亲Alice de Mortimer20岁。他于大约1340年与Anne Pennington在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世在苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Thompson I was born in 1320, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, John Thompson, was 20 and his mother, Alice de Mortimer, was 20. He married Anne Pennington about 1340, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in Scotland, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Thompson I est né en 1320, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, John Thompson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice de Mortimer, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Anne Pennington environ 1340, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé à Écosse, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Thompson I 1320 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thompson 20 und seine Mutter Alice de Mortimer 20. Er hat um 1340 in Scotland Anne Pennington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Thompson I è nato il nel 1320 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Thompson, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Mortimer, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Anne Pennington circa 1340, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel Scotland, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Dunbartonshire, Scotland: スコットランドダンバートンシュアイア
ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: William Thompson Iが1320年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Thompsonは20歳，母Alice de Mortimerは20歳であった。約1340年にスコットランドでAnne Penningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はスコットランドで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Thompson I(이)가 1320년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thompson(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Mortimer(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1340년 스컷랜드에서 Anne Pennington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 스컷랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Thompson I nasceu em 1320, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Thompson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Mortimer, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Pennington aproximadamente 1340, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em Scotland, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Thompson I родился в 1320 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Thompson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Mortimer, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Pennington около 1340 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в местности Шотландия и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Thompson I nació en 1320, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, John Thompson, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice de Mortimer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Anne Pennington aproximadamente 1340, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en Scotland, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
